## Request type

Choose one:

- [ ] Private walkthrough
- [ ] Short technical evaluation
- [ ] Limited beta diagnostic
- [ ] Developer / investor discussion
- [ ] Other

## Short context

Briefly describe what you want to evaluate.

Do not include secrets, API keys, private logs, personal data, customer data, or confidential source code.

## Environment

- Windows version:
- Local or remote LLMs used:
- Tools you want to connect or evaluate:
- Existing MCP usage, if any:

## What you want to see

Examples:

- local MCP workflow;
- daemon / CLI diagnostic;
- tool inventory;
- controlled terminal execution;
- workflow dry-run;
- procedural memory concept;
- Windows integration.

## Confidentiality level

Choose one:

- [ ] Public summary is enough
- [ ] Keep details minimal in this issue
- [ ] I need a private follow-up before sharing details

## Expected outcome

What would make this evaluation useful for you?

## Notes

MINI_MCP_CLIENT is currently a private beta. This public repository is a showcase and does not distribute the full private runtime.
